message:
test(ftui-extras): improve canvas.rs test coverage (bd-rlzf3)

Add 20 new tests (35→55 total) covering Mode default, ensure_size
grow-only, polygon_filled edge cases, point_in_convex_polygon,
clear generation wraparound, CanvasRef rendering, Canvas/CanvasRef
style builders, all 16 block combinations, halfblock both-colored,
point stale color clearing, rect/circle edge cases, and derive
trait verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
